decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifact creatures and using cards like Galvanic Blast to deal direct damage to the opponent. It utilizes cards like Myr Enforcer and Utrom Monitor to put pressure on the opponent while also generating card advantage through cards like Thoughtcast. The deck also has some graveyard hate with Nihil Spellbomb and can finish off the opponent with burn spells like Reckoner's Bargain or artifacts like Makeshift Munitions. With a mix of aggression and card advantage, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent by casting low-cost burn spells and utilizing creatures with abilities that trigger when spells are cast. The deck also includes cards that allow for additional card draw and mana efficiency to keep the pressure up on the opponent. With a heavy emphasis on fast, aggressive gameplay, this deck aims to finish off the opponent before they can stabilize or mount a defense.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the Tireless Tribe combo, which involves buffing the creature's toughness with cards like Inside Out and Aurora Eidolon to then activate its ability and draw a large number of cards in one turn. The deck includes protection spells like Emerge Unscathed and Prismatic Strands to ensure the combo goes off smoothly. The inclusion of Pursue the Past helps to retrieve combo pieces from the graveyard if needed. Overall, the deck is designed to efficiently execute the combo while maintaining card advantage and protection.

The main strategy of the deck is to quickly play cheap artifacts and creatures in order to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of attackers. By utilizing cards like Thoughtcast and Vedalken Engineer to draw cards and generate mana, the deck aims to maintain a steady stream of threats while keeping the pressure on the opponent. Cards like Retraction Helix and Banishing Knack help to provide additional utility and control options, allowing the deck to adapt to different situations and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the deck includes a few key defensive cards like Dispel and Cryogen Relic to help protect its creatures and ensure a successful aggressor.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing various counterspells and removal cards, while also generating card advantage through drawing and scrying effects. The deck includes creatures that can provide card advantage or be used as threats, such as Augur of Bolas and Tandem Lookout. Additionally, there are a few utility lands included to disrupt opponents' strategies. Overall, the goal is to outlast the opponent by efficiently managing resources and disrupting their game plan.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Utopia Sprawl and Arbor Elf, allowing you to play big threats like Bramble Wurm and Nyxborn Hydra early on. The aim is to overwhelm your opponent with powerful creatures and pump spells like Malevolent Rumble and Snake Umbra, dealing damage efficiently and aggressively. Ram Through can be used both as removal and as a finishing blow, while cards like Eldrazi Repurposer and Avenging Hunter provide additional utility and aggression. Overall, the deck emphasizes speed, power, and aggression to quickly defeat your opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game using a variety of counter spells and disruptive cards while leveraging cheap and efficient threats like Cryptic Serpent and Murmuring Mystic. The deck also employs cards like Brainstorm and Ponder to dig for key pieces and maintain card advantage. Overall, the strategy revolves around using control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan and eventually close out the game with powerful threats.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game by ramping up mana quickly using the Urza lands (Urza's Mine, Urza's Power Plant, Urza's Tower) to generate huge amounts of mana. This allows for the casting of powerful creatures like Maelstrom Colossus and Pinnacle Kill-Ship to dominate the battlefield. In addition, the deck uses cards like Ancient Stirrings and Expedition Map to search for specific lands or threats, while also utilizing cards like Bonder's Ornament and Candy Trail for extra card draw and resources. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with large creatures and efficient control spells.

The main idea of this Pauper 1 vs 1 deck is to utilize the Tireless Tribe creature in combination with cards like Inside Out, Pursue the Past, and Thrilling Discovery to quickly build up a powerful combo. By manipulating the Tribe's power and toughness, discarding and retrieving cards from the graveyard, and generating additional card advantage, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a sudden burst of damage or an unblockable attack. The inclusion of various support cards like Abandon Attachments and Prismatic Strands helps to protect the combo and keep the pressure on the opponent.

This deck focuses on utilizing cards like Cabal Ritual, Dark Ritual, and Lotus Petal to quickly generate mana and cycle through the deck with Street Wraith and Page, Loose Leaf. The goal is to fill the graveyard with creatures like Drannith Healer and Drannith Stinger, then cast Reaping the Graves to bring them back in large numbers. Imposing Vantasaur and Horror of the Broken Lands provide additional threats, while Rowan's Grim Search helps find key pieces. The synergy between cycling, graveyard recursion, and creature sacrifice creates a powerful combo strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game using various gate cards and artifacts, while also utilizing cards like Cast Down and Suffocating Fumes to remove threats from the opponent. The deck focuses on gaining value through bouncing creatures like Glint Hawk and Kor Skyfisher to reuse their abilities, as well as generating card advantage with cards like Cryogen Relic and Nihil Spellbomb. The deck also has some graveyard recursion with Omen of the Dead and Outlaw Medic to maintain board presence and outlast the opponent.

The deck focuses on using a combination of removal spells and card draw to control the opponent's board and resources. It also includes a sacrifice theme with cards like Fanatical Offering and Cauldron Familiar. The win condition of the deck seems to be through draining the opponent's life with cards like Pestilence and Corrupt, while maintaining board presence with creatures like Thorn of the Black Rose and Troll of Khazad-dûm. Additionally, the inclusion of recursion cards like Witch's Cottage allows for resilience against removal.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and efficient counterspells to maintain board control and pressure the opponent. By playing low-cost creatures like Faerie Miscreant and Faerie Seer, and using cards like Spellstutter Sprite and Counterspell to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure a win. Moon-Circuit Hacker and Ninja of the Deep Hours provide additional card advantage and tempo plays, while Sunken City can help boost the power of creatures for additional damage output.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent through a combination of burn spells and creature attacks. By utilizing cards like Fireblast, Lightning Bolt, and Fiery Temper, along with creatures like Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather, players can apply consistent pressure and finish off their opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. The deck also includes card draw and mana ramp options to ensure that it maintains a fast pace and doesn't run out of steam.

The main focus of this red aggro deck is to quickly play low-cost creatures and spells to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and burn spells. By efficiently utilizing cards like Goblin Bushwhacker and Burning-Tree Emissary, along with efficient burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast, this deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. With a focus on high damage output and quick finishes, this deck is designed to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain that pressure throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a strong board presence with low-cost creatures and enchantments that buff them. By utilizing cards like Ethereal Armor and Hyena Umbra, the small creatures become powerful threats that can quickly overwhelm the opponent. Protection spells like Emerge Unscathed and Benevolent Blessing help keep your creatures safe while Spirit Link and Sentinel's Eyes provide lifelink and card draw to maintain a strong advantage. With cards like Lagonna-Band Trailblazer and Akroan Skyguard leading the charge, this deck aims to win the game swiftly and decisively.
